hdb750c48g5ec0g45ffg83aegc491ea3c515b: Remarkable. Not even the ghaik demonstrate such mastery of the mind as these True Souls.
h448ca9b2g20aag4ad4gb5a2g1a458f1feebf: *Your mind still aches from Nere's intrusion. Sheer, terrifying power.*
hfb611b87g5fabg4915ga436g71dd3352600c: Until we are cleansed, we will be drawn to them - and them to us.
h981c089bgec3ag4567g92bdgc48af51d2789: We can use this connection to earn True Souls' trust and gain an advantage.
h91ee9585g4c2fg448ag9f97g8b1c2acf96e9: Perhaps. At very least, we must seize every opportunity for domination.
h7127c2dcg11e4g4b95g8831g018eab5aa5fb: But not at the risk of inviting more apparitions to our dreams.
h3c9e4b95gefb4g41bfg9776g32cdcfbd8dcf: Excellent counsel. We must seize every opportunity for domination.
h3a9a3fb5g632ag47e5g9ed1g7489f4589b84: If they can learn such powers, so can we. Imagine how we could shape the world.
he456473bg7447g4506g9f26gc6f2eddafb9a: Do you not understand? To seek this power is to invite the parasite to feed. We cannot both relish its gifts and seek to be rid of it.
h17dba280gf054g4bb0ga483g3d8c1c21702c: What do you suggest we do?
h9ea70fe4gb5dbg4318gb5e0gc77a6cdf0ba8: We cleanse ourselves of the parasites that build this connection.
hc8cc198dg44f9g4ffcg9d35gd652535bf79f: And we prepare ourselves for a harsh truth: the ghaik menace may not end at purification.
h03779a81g8030g419bg9363ge962aea60cb2: I will end these True Souls, and I will reap Vlaakith's reward.
